
# Dynalicense API - Autarkic Zero Trust Encryption Service

## Profile
- Description: Automated API providing time-limited, hardware-isolated AES key parameters for secure offline data processing. Perfect for AI agents needing localized data protection without permanent cloud exposure.
- Category: Security, Encryption, Agentic Commerce
- Payment Protocol: HTTP 402 (x402) / Stripe Agentic Suite
- Base Price: 1.00 EUR per token generation

## API Endpoints

### GET /v1/request-token
- Description: Initiates a secure handshake for a time-controlled encryption parameter.
- Response: HTTP 402 Payment Required
- Payment Headers Required: x402-payment-destination, x402-amount

### POST /v1/generate-key
- Description: Delivers the cryptographic parameters after verified payment.
- Input: JSON { "session_id": "string", "client_public_parameter": "string" }
- Output: JSON { "status": "active", "ram_timeout_seconds": 3600, "server_public_parameter": "string" }

## Usage Rules
- All generated parameters operate strictly on a Zero Knowledge Proof basis.
- Keys are temporarily held in isolated RAM and physically overwritten with zeros after 60 minutes.
- No permanent logs or data duplicates are stored.
